DESCRIPTION: This test simulates an assertion error to demonstrate Product Bugs category

NAME: User can edit an existing todo item

DESCRIPTION: This test simulates a timeout error to demonstrate Test Infrastructure Issues category
NAME: Simulated timeout error - infrastructure issue

DESCRIPTION: Verify that Active filter shows incomplete todos and Completed filter shows done todos
NAME: User can filter todos by Active and Completed
